author: y4rr
content: GPU bf16 parity PASS. Surfaced + fixed real bug (tied-embeddings in LlamaGpuInferencer::new — symmetry with CPU path's load_hf_state_dict). Verdict: top1=100%, top5_overlap=4/5, cosine_sim=0.9993, max_abs=1.22, last_match=True. max_abs floor at 1.5 (bf16 noise budget) validated by transformers bf16-vs-f32 control = 1.40 (ferrotorch is more numerically faithful than transformers' own bf16). First cargo test that runs a real pretrained checkpoint through the GPU path.
